summary.en: Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years building microservices and backend systems in fintech and enterprise domains. Works mainly in .NET Core, Golang, and cloud platforms (Azure, Oracle Cloud, Kubernetes); CKAD-certified, applying the same TDD and hexagonal-architecture discipline across both languages. Runs the Coding Afternoon tech blog — writing mainly about Golang (design patterns, TDD, concurrency) — and has spoken twice at GDG Kaohsiung.
summary.zh: 4 年以上微服務與後端系統開發經驗的全棧軟體工程師,涵蓋金融科技與企業領域。主要使用 .NET Core、Golang 與雲端平台 (Azure、Oracle Cloud、Kubernetes);獲得 CKAD 認證,在兩種語言上應用相同的 TDD 與六邊形架構原則。經營 Coding Afternoon 技術部落格 — 主要撰寫 Golang (設計模式、TDD、併發) — 並在 GDG Kaohsiung 發表過兩次演講。

description.en: CI/CD automation, reproducible test environments, team workshops (TDD, Docker/K8s).
description.zh: CI/CD 自動化、可復現測試環境、團隊工作坊(TDD、Docker/K8s)。
單體到微服務遷移、六邊形架構、SSO/OAuth。

description.en: Coding Afternoon blog built and run solo — content, site, and subscription automation.
description.zh: Coding Afternoon 部落格獨自構建與運營 — 內容、網站與訂閱自動化。

description.en: CKAD-certified; ELK observability on Kubernetes; legacy refactoring.
description.zh: CKAD 認證；Kubernetes 上的 ELK 可觀測性；遺留系統重構。

details.en: Tech-education blog (coding-afternoon.com), built and run solo.
details.zh: 技術教育部落格 (coding-afternoon.com)，獨自構建與運營。

achievements.en: Operate the platform end to end: content, site, and an automated subscription flow
achievements.zh: 端對端管理平台:內容、網站與自動化訂閱流程

achievements.en: Authored technical series on Golang (design patterns, TDD with AI, goroutine concurrency) and blockchain, plus the open-source EccSDK NuGet package
achievements.zh: 撰寫 Golang(設計模式、AI 輔助 TDD、Goroutine 並發) 與區塊鏈技術系列,並開源 EccSDK NuGet 套件

details.en: Built two .NET Core backends (Commercial + OS) for a global vehicle-care platform, driving its Taiwan-market expansion with Clean Architecture, CQRS, and TDD.
details.zh: 為全球車輛護理平台建置 Commercial 與 OS 兩套 .NET Core 後端,主導台灣市場擴張與第三方在地整合,採 Clean Architecture、CQRS 與 TDD。

achievements.en: Built an entire CRM Client-360 platform from scratch (Client, Vehicle, Appointment, Budget, WorkOrder, Invoice) as MediatR vertical slices, with 360 read models, dashboards, and multi-tenant (WorkshopId) isolation
achievements.zh: 從零建置整個 CRM 客戶 360 平台 (Client、Vehicle、Appointment、Budget、WorkOrder、Invoice),以 MediatR 垂直切片實作,含 360 讀取模型、儀表板與多租戶 (WorkshopId) 隔離

achievements.en: Integrated the LINE Messaging API for the Taiwan market: webhook HMAC signature verification, push/reply client, Flex-card messages, link-code client binding, and LINE as a Hangfire-scheduled appointment notification channel
achievements.zh: 為台灣市場串接 LINE Messaging API:webhook HMAC 簽章驗證、推播/回覆、Flex 卡片、link-code 客戶綁定,並將 LINE 作為 Hangfire 排程的預約通知管道

achievements.en: Delivered CarQuality third-party integrations: a payment gateway whose transaction state machine uses atomic conditional updates to prevent concurrent-checkout races, full e-invoicing lifecycle (issue/void/allowance with provider-failure rollback), and a Hangfire stock-import job
achievements.zh: 建置 CarQuality 第三方整合:金流交易狀態機以原子條件更新防止併發重複結帳、電子發票全生命週期 (開立/作廢/折讓,含 provider 失敗回滾),以及 Hangfire 庫存匯入排程

achievements.en: Implemented Taiwan localization domain rules: a country-scoped national-document catalog, country-dispatched document-number validators (Spanish DNI/NIE vs Taiwan ID/business number), required-field guards, and Taiwan tire specification attributes
achievements.zh: 實作台灣在地化領域規則:國別證件目錄、依國別分派的證號驗證器 (西班牙 DNI/NIE vs 台灣身分證/統編)、必填欄位守門與台灣輪胎規格欄位

achievements.en: Built the commercial proposals subsystem (per-line discounts, price snapshotting, an atomic per-country proposal-number allocator) and a MobilityConfigs/Rates pricing engine
achievements.zh: 建置商務端提案子系統 (逐筆折扣、價格快照、依國別產號的原子序號配置器) 與 MobilityConfigs/Rates 計價引擎

achievements.en: Engineered cross-cutting infrastructure with EF Core SaveChanges interceptors — field-level audit logging and workshop-scoped license-plate uniqueness — plus a roles and module-permission access-control system
achievements.zh: 以 EF Core SaveChanges 攔截器打造跨切面基礎建設 — 欄位級稽核日誌與工作坊範圍車牌唯一性 — 以及角色與模組權限存取控制系統

details.en: Migrated a credit-loan platform to microservices; set up cloud infrastructure on Oracle Cloud.
details.zh: 將信用貸款平台遷移至微服務;在 Oracle Cloud 設置雲端基礎設施。

achievements.en: Migrated the credit loan system from a monolith to microservices
achievements.zh: 將信用貸款系統從單體遷移至微服務

achievements.en: Redesigned the strategy module to separate business rules from loan-processing logic, so new loan rules can be added without changing core flows
achievements.zh: 重設計策略模組,將業務規則與貸款處理邏輯分離,使新規則可直接新增而無需修改核心流程

achievements.en: Implemented SSO/OAuth authentication shared across internal services
achievements.zh: 實現跨內部服務的共享 SSO/OAuth 認證

achievements.en: Automated CI/CD with Azure DevOps and deployed production services on Oracle Cloud (OCI)
achievements.zh: 使用 Azure DevOps 實現 CI/CD 自動化,並在 Oracle Cloud (OCI) 上部署生產服務

achievements.en: Set up test environments (OracleDB, Redis, identity services) for local verification
achievements.zh: 建置測試環境 (OracleDB、Redis、身份服務) 用於本地驗證

details.en: Developed payment processing and third-party API integrations, with TDD and hexagonal architecture.
details.zh: 開發支付處理與第三方 API 整合,採用 TDD 與六邊形架構。

achievements.en: Led the intern team as Scrum Master; ran workshops on hexagonal architecture, TDD, and refactoring
achievements.zh: 擔任 Scrum Master 帶領實習生團隊;舉辦六邊形架構、TDD 與重構工作坊

achievements.en: Hosted Docker and Kubernetes workshops for the team
achievements.zh: 為團隊舉辦 Docker 與 Kubernetes 工作坊

achievements.en: Built ELK monitoring for Kubernetes services to surface production issues early
achievements.zh: 為 Kubernetes 服務構建 ELK 監控,及早發現生產問題

achievements.en: Refactored legacy code and fixed bugs that had persisted for over two years
achievements.zh: 重構遺留程式碼並修復持續超過兩年的缺陷

achievements.en: Spoke twice at GDG Kaohsiung (Golang, developer tooling)
achievements.zh: 在 GDG Kaohsiung 發表過兩次演講 (Golang、開發工具)

education.title: Master of Computer Science
education.sub_title: National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, YunTech

details.en: Researched Blockchain and Network Security; thesis on a secure encryption scheme called Chameleon Hash.
details.zh: 研究區塊鏈與網路安全;論文主題為名為 Chameleon Hash 的安全加密方案。

education.title: Bachelor of Information and Telecommunication Engineering

details.en: Focused on Blockchain and Network Security research.
details.zh: 專注區塊鏈與網路安全研究。

title.zh: 擔任 DevOpsDays Taipei 2026 講者

title.en: Trader Risk Radar: Risk Analysis & Ranking API for On-Chain Perpetual Traders
title.zh: Trader Risk Radar:鏈上永續合約交易員的風險分析與排行 API

title.en: From 0 to 1: Golang TDD with AI
title.zh: 從 0 到 1:Golang TDD with AI

title.en: 30 Design Patterns with Golang in 30 Days
title.zh: 30 天內精通 Golang 的 30 個設計模式
附加專案:構建可編輯的區塊鏈

title.en: Open Source SDK for NuGet: EccSDK
Monitoring Discord Latency with Golang Bot
title.zh: 使用 Golang Bot 監控 Discord 延遲
